text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that allows computers to see and understand images and videos. It involves tasks like image recognition, where a computer identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which locates specific objects within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps the vehicle recognize traffic signs, pedestrians, and other cars to navigate safely. It is also used in healthcare to analyze medical scans, in security systems for facial recognition, and even in smartphones for photo editing. As technology improves, computer vision continues to make our lives easier and safer.
